candidates.why: Best revenue label; however it appears twice, and the lower instance appears to include 'Other operating revenues' in some years.
Finance income, not top-line revenue.
Finance income, not operating sales/revenue.

variables.notes: 'Operating revenues' appears twice with different values. The lower occurrence seems to be the total including 'Other operating revenues' in some years, but duplicate identical labels cannot be disambiguated in the required output format.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost and best match for cost of sales.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating cost line from the income statement.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component.
Overhead bucket, but component rows exist so subtotal is less preferred.
Overhead component.
Explicit R&D exists only as supplemental and below EBIT, so not included in SG&A components to avoid misclassification.

variables.notes: Preferred component overhead rows over subtotal 'Operating expenses'. Several strong SG&A components ('Payroll expenses', 'Management Remuneration', 'Maintenance', 'Rental Expense', 'Other Operating Expense') were not in the candidate list, so rows were chosen from the full preview. Excluded depreciation/amortisation and excluded supplemental R&D because it appears below operating profit. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll expenses, [Income Statement] Management Remuneration, [Income Statement] Maintenance, [Income Statement] Rental Expense, [Income Statement] Other Operating Expense

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line; appears below EBIT and is supplemental, but still the best available R&D measure.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not period expense.

variables.notes: Only clear R&D line is supplemental and below operating profit, so it is mapped to XRD but not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Primary recurring interest cost line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Recurring lease-related interest expense; appropriate to include with interest expense.
Minority attribution, not interest expense.
Minority attribution, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded FX and other net financial items.

candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity measure; preferable to total 'Equity' because MIB is reported separately.
Total equity including non-controlling interests, so less preferred when NCI is separately available.
Balance sheet total, not equity attributable to owners.

variables.notes: Preferred parent/group equity because non-controlling interests are separately reported in MIB.

candidates.why: Best match for minority interest / NCI.
Equivalent concept, secondary label.
Income statement attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet NCI line to pair with BE without double counting.
